title: AIM Question Schema
description: Validates a single question object used in AIM lessons and assessments. All fields required by the AIM algorithm must be present.

skill_id.description: Skill this question targets. Must match a skill_id in skill_map.json.

concept.description: Sub-concept within the skill. Used by the error pattern classifier.

difficulty.description: Question difficulty on a 1-5 scale. Used by the difficulty adapter.

prompt_ar.description: Question prompt in Arabic for Arabic-speaking learners.

choices.description: Answer choices. Required for mcq and matching types.

explanation_en.description: English explanation of why the answer is correct. Shown to learner after attempt.

explanation_ar.description: Arabic explanation of why the answer is correct.

common_error_tags.description: Error tags from the skill_map error glossary. Used by the error pattern classifier.

prerequisites.description: Skill IDs that must be mastered before this question. Used by the prerequisite gap detector.

hints.description: Progressive hints for the learner. Must have at least one entry.
